'''Goran''' was a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]], imprisoned in the Imperial base on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]].

==Biography==
When his [[Unidentified Jabiimi prisoner|wife]] was being harassed by Lieutenant [[Clynn]], Goran fought to the best of his abilities, only to be subdued by the cruel Imperial officer. He later escaped [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]] with the other Jabiimi prisoners.

{{Char-stub}}
